description: Composition:Dark pink round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking 5. Remove promptly 6. Line dry inside-out in shade 7. Warm iron only 8. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Regular FitThis dark pink cotton tee from mr. men is perfect for casual wear. The bold graphic on the chest and its saturated colour is in line with the latest trend. Team it up with jeans or cargoes for casual outings and hanging out with friends and let loose that mischievous side of you in all glory.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-19"
